name: files
description:
This model describes a file system.
It represents oily system elements which can be a folders or files. All file system elements have a name. Every file system element must belong to a folder, and folders can aggregate any number of file system elements. Files have information about their extension and their size.

name: uni
description:
This model represents some entities of a course. 
We know that courses have a name and a specific number of credits. Each course can have one or more professors, who have a name.
Professors could participate in any number of courses. For a course to exist, it must aggregate, at least, five students, where each student has a name. Students can be enrolled in any number of courses. Finally, students can be accommodated in dormitories, where each dormitory can have from one to four students. Besides, each dormitory has a price.

name: theater
description:
This is a model about theaters.

Theaters have a location, and they can play any play, which can be musicals or operas. Plays have a name and can be played either at day or night. Plays are written by one or more authors, who have a name. 
There are many participants who act in a play, participants also have a name. A particular participant acts in a particular session of a play, where each session begins and ends at a specific time. 
Both authors and participants are persons. Any play can have any number of participants, and any participant can act in any number of plays.
Furthermore, each participant acts in specific sessions of a play, where the session has a begin time and an
end time. Regarding authors, one can be the author of more than one play. Besides, plays can take place in more than one theater. Finally, participants can act in any number of
plays.

name: videostore
description:
This is a model of Video Stores.
There are also clients and movies in the system, all of which (video stores, clients and movies) have a
name. Video stores rent out movies, where the same movie can be offered in any video store. Video stores have clients. The same client can be a client of several video stores.

name: amphibious
description:
This system represents different types of vehicles. 
A Vehicle has a position, a speed and a maximum speed. Besides, it has an environment (with a value among “land”, “water” and “air”). Finally, it can move for a given time. Those are the features of a generic vehicle.
Then, we have land vehicles and marine vehicles as specific types of vehicles, where both have all the same features as a vehicle. Finally, an amphibious vehicle can be both a land vehicle and a marine vehicle.

name: airlines
description:
Many different airlines can operate in different airports. 
An airline has a name and an airport has a code and is in a city.
Each airline has associated a cost for operating in a specific airport. 
Besides, the operation of an airline in a specific airport can be started and stopped at any time, and its operating cost can be updated at any time.
The relation between airport and airline contains a details class with the operating cost.

name: robots
description:
This model represents robots in charge of performing tasks.
There are robots that have an id. Robots can be of type cleaning robot and transport robot. Robots can
perform tasks, which have an id. When a robot performs a task, the task execution is recorded. A
task execution has an id, a start time and a location. The location can be either corridors or rooms.

name: car
description:
This system represents a car. 
Cars belong to models, which in turn belong to makes. Each car has four wheels, one engine and a set of seats. Every make and model have a unique name. Each wheel has a diameter, which must be the same for all wheels of the same car. Each engine has a certain power. Likewise, the seats have a size, which must be the same for all the seats of the cars of the same model.Each car has a number plate that identifies it.
